title: NBA Revised Guidelines on Biological Diversity Act (BDA), 2002
description: Source: PIB Subject: Environment Context: The National Biodiversity Authority (NBA) has approved a series of policy measures to streamline the utilization of Access and Benefit Sharing (ABS) funds and revised guidelines for Designated Repositories under the Biological Diversity Act, 2002.
